title: alstonia lenormandii var. minutiflora
intro: Alstonia lenormandii var. minutiflora, also known as the Yulan or Chinese Thunder of God vine, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family. It is a climbing vine native to China, used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alstonia lenormandii var. minutiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve cardiovascular health. Alstonia lenormandii var. minutiflora can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
